label: Input
description: Content sent to Claude: prompt + files read for the first time + tool results.

label: Output
description: Response generated by Claude: text, code, explanations.

label: Cache write (5m)
description: Context cached for reuse with a 5-minute TTL (billed 1.25x input).

label: Cache write (1h)
description: Context cached for reuse with a 1-hour TTL (billed 2x input).

label: Server tool use
description: Server-side tool requests (e.g. web search), billed per request, not per token.
